name: instructions
description: Keep the agent instruction system alive — retro/lessons/instructions-audit/instructions-maintenance/rules-change skills + 2 audit agents, with apply-safe/propose-risky governance, a caps hook that mechanically enforces the instruction-surface size/count caps, a file-guard hook that makes writes to enforcement surfaces (settings, hooks) ask the user, a config-driven meta-lint engine (project instruction-system linter behind .agent/meta-lint.json, pulsed at SessionStart and blocking at Stop on a size/count cap breach), and a tripwire-guard engine running project-owned .agent/guards.d asserts on Bash commands.
